@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(auth_mw.expiry.skew30)
C: reg_t ∧ exp_lt_no_skew ∧ min_diff ∧ single_err_map
H: skew30_boundary_refresh_loop
P: encode_skew30_explicitly → normalize_timestamps_ms
V: edge(-30s) ∧ edge(-31s_401)
R: ! auth_bypass ∧ ! perf_deg_loop
A: fix_skew30_exp_compare

[AUDIT]
Fix auth mw.expiry.skew30, preserve regression test, strict expiry check without grace window, and add a regression test for the 30-second grace window with boundary at minus 30 seconds.
